item.title: Segmart 4-Drawer Dressers Recalled Due to Risk of Serious Injury or Death from Tip-Over and Entrapment; Violate Mandatory Standard for Clothing Storage Units; Sold on Walmart.com by SOFT
item.company: Online at Walmart from January 2025 through March 2026 for about $80.
item.brand: Online at Walmart from January 2025 through March 2026 for about $80.
item.summary: This recall involves Segmart 4-Drawer Dressers. The recalled dressers are made of particle board and were sold in black and white. The dressers have four drawers, are 15.7 inches long by 26 inches wide by 28.5 inches tall and weigh 70 pounds. Model numbers "FFLWM002BK" or "FFLWM002WE" are printed on labels located the product packaging.
item.remedy: Consumers should immediately stop using the recalled dressers if they are not anchored to the wall and place them in an area that children cannot access. Contact SOFT for instructions on how to identify affected units and dispose of the dressers to receive a full refund. Consumers will be asked to submit a photo to segmartdresserecall@outlook.com demonstrating disposal of the product.
item.payoutAmount: Repair, refund, replacement, or other remedy if stated by the CPSC notice
